ocr_findings.description: Cleaned OCR adds extensive markdown formatting (emoji icons 🌐 📋 🐼, underline markup <u>...</u>, bold **...**) that does not correspond to standard markdown structure visible in the image. These are interpretive formatting additions by the re-OCR model, not errors in text capture.
Last sentence in image: '最初にお伝えしておきますが、個人情報保護法に関する問題は「氏名」と「身体' — OCR captures this partial sentence correctly, ending mid-sentence at page boundary (76). Normal truncation.

reviewer_notes: Compliance / social media policy / personal information protection law page (cleaned version used). All substantive prose text matches the image accurately. The cleaned OCR adds decorative emoji and underline markup not present in the source image, but these are non-destructive additions. The bullet-point summary box content ('コンプライアンスとは…') is fully and accurately captured.
